product.value: EHECS Earnings Hours and Employment Costs Survey - Quarterly

label: Average Weekly, Hourly Earnings and Weekly Paid Hour of All Employees
note:
Estimates in relation to Defence and public sector have been updated from Q2 2021 due to a revision in our input data processes. This update primarily impacts employment and job vacancy estimates and does not have a significant impact on previously published sectoral trends in relation to earnings.

The Public Sector Pay Agreement 2024-2026 introduced an increase in the annualised basic salaries for public servants of 2.25%, which was backdated to 1 January 2024, with some or all backdated pay received in Q2 2024.

ELC quarterly estimates were updated on 29/05/2024 to incorporate updated population estimates for the period 2016 Q3 to 2023 Q4, based on the results of Census 2022.

The Building Momentum Public Service Agreement 2021-2022 introduced an increase in the annualised basic salaries for public servants of 3%, which was backdated to 02 February 2022, with some or all backdated pay received in Q4 2022.

For more information, please go to the [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/statistics/earnings/earningsandlabourcosts/]statistical release[/url] page and [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/methods/earnings/earningshoursandemploymentcostssurvey/]Background Notes[/url].
